inputs.label: Drink Volume (mL)
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the alcoholic beverage per serving in milliliters.

inputs.label: Alcohol by Volume (%)
inputs.businessContext: ABV percentage shown on the beverage label.

inputs.label: Number of Drinks
inputs.businessContext: How many servings or drinks consumed.

inputs.label: Ethanol Density (g/mL)
inputs.businessContext: Standard density of pure ethanol (0.8 g/mL).

inputs.label: Energy per Gram of Alcohol (kcal/g)
inputs.businessContext: Metabolizable energy per gram of alcohol (7 kcal/g).
